pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin version to support Java 11 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin (e.g., 3.3) do not support the <release> flag or may fail to compile against JDK 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the release flag for cross-compilation support.
pom.xml.why_exists: The <release> flag is the standard way to specify the target JDK version in newer compiler plugins, replacing separate source/target settings.

src/test/java/org/powertac/common/Tariff.general_idea: Replace deprecated Long constructor with valueOf factory method.
